title: The Effect of Hope and Awareness on the Decoding of Climate Change Information Accessed on the Internet – Dataset
author: Savaş, Sezgin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains survey data collected from 383 participants to examine the relationship between hope, awareness, and the decoding of climate change information accessed on the internet. The dataset includes Likert-scale measurements of psychological and cognitive constructs related to climate communication. The data were analyzed using correlation, regression, and difference tests.
steps_raw: This dataset contains survey data collected from 383 participants to examine the relationship between hope, awareness, and the decoding of climate change information accessed on the internet. The dataset includes Likert-scale measurements of psychological and cognitive constructs related to climate communication. The data were analyzed using correlation, regression, and difference tests.
